purpose: Make Antigravity a Jit mission-control lane while Codex remains deep executor and evidence owner.

antigravity.auth_source: Antigravity Google account vault; no secrets are stored in this repo.
antigravity.exec_plan_status: planned: current antigravity 1.107.0 help advertises chat/add-mcp, but not --exec.

convergence.role_contract: Antigravity coordinates wide verification; Codex/Jit executes deep changes and owns evidence.

chrome-devtools.purpose: Chrome DevTools inspection, screenshots, network, and performance debugging.

gateway.name: bifrost
gateway.routing_policy: Route wide coordination and parallel verification to Antigravity; route deep execution, code integration, and final evidence to Codex/Jit.
